handoff.summary: Closed the standard impeccable compatibility step by referencing the sealed implementation Run and honoring the requested skip-harvest pre-check.

decisions.text: Stop at the workflow pre-check because the command includes --skip-harvest.
Treat Run 20260719-001-maestro-impeccable as the implementation and verification authority.
严格执行 --skip-harvest，不重复沉淀知识。
不修改已实现源码、数据、测试或设计文件。

concerns: Remote Vercel deployment was not executed; the standard local Next.js production build passed.
Full catalog grouping runs once per cold server process and may need a precomputed read model if data grows substantially.
未执行远程 Vercel 发布，仅验证标准 Next.js production build。
目录冷启动会进行一次完整数据聚合，数据显著增长后可考虑预计算只读视图。
